faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Douglaston?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Douglaston typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method used. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Douglaston home?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Douglaston homes take 4-8 hours for the initial service, depending on property size. Heat treatments are typically completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require follow-up visits spaced 2-3 weeks apart to target newly hatched eggs and ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Douglaston?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are completely safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols. For heat treatments, no chemicals are used at all. We provide clear instructions on any necessary preparations and when it's safe to return to treated areas.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment service in Douglaston?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our bed bug treatments with a comprehensive warranty that includes follow-up inspections and re-treatment if necessary. Our goal is complete elimination, and we'll continue working until your Douglaston home is entirely bed bug-free, typically including 2-3 follow-up visits in our service package.
